zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Corbet於1054年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利時，他的父親Sir Hugh Corbet11051歲，母親Isabella de Payes30歲。他和Adèle d'Alcester至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他於1086年住在英國英格蘭史洛普爾。他於1096年登記服兵役。他去世於1122年1月之後在英國瓦維其可爾阿爾斯特，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾阿爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Corbet was born in 1054, in Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, his father, Sir Hugh Corbet, was 11051 and his mother, Isabella de Payes, was 30. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Adèle d'Alcester. He lived in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom in 1086. He registered for military service in 1096. He died after January 1122, in Alcester, Warwickshire, England, and was buried in Alcester, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Corbet est né en 1054, à Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Sir Hugh Corbet, avait 11051 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Payes, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Adèle d'Alcester. Il a vécu à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1086. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1096. Il est décédé après janvier 1122, à Alcester, Warwickshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Alcester, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Corbet 1054 in Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh Corbet 11051 und seine Mutter Isabella de Payes 30. Er hatte mit Adèle d'Alcester mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1086 hat er in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er hat sich 1096 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb nach Januar 1122 in Alcester, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Alcester, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Corbet è nato il nel 1054 nel Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Sir Hugh Corbet, aveva 11051 anni e il suo madre, Isabella de Payes, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Adèle d'Alcester. Vissuto a Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1086. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1096. Morì dopo il gennaio 1122, nel Alcester, Warwickshire, England, e fu sepolto a Alcester, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Corbetが1054年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Corbetは11051歳，母Isabella de Payesは30歳であった。彼はAdèle d'Alcesterとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1086年にはイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアに住んでいた。彼は1096年に兵役登録をした。彼は1122年1月以後にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアルセスターで死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアアルセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Corbet(이)가 1054년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Corbet(은)는 11051세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella de Payes(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Adèle d'Alcester(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1086년도에 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 살았다. 그는 1096년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1122년 1월 이후 영국 워윅실르 알스스터에서 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 알스스터에 묻혔다.

mn.Caus Castle, Shropshire, England: Castle-Pulverbatch, Salopesberia, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Corbet nasceu em 1054, em Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Sir Hugh Corbet, tinha 11051 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Payes, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Adèle d'Alcester. Ele viveu em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1086. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1096. Ele faleceu após janeiro de 1122, em Alcester, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Alcester, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Corbet родился в 1054 г. в местности сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Corbet было 11051 год, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Payes, 30. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Adèle d'Alcester. Он жил в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1086 году. В 1096 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер после январь 1122 г. в местности алсестир, варвиккшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности алсестир, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Corbet nació en 1054, en Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Sir Hugh Corbet, tenía 11051 años y su mamá, Isabella de Payes, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Adèle d'Alcester. Vivió en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1086. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1096. Murió después de enero de 1122, en Alcester, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Alcester, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
